name: Chicken Breasts with Curried Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, cook shredded carrot, sliced green onion, and curry powder in margarine until the vegetables are tender. Remove from heat and stir in bread crumbs, raisins, and water.
2. Pound each chicken breast half (12 oz total) between two pieces of clear plastic wrap lightly with a meat mallet to a thickness of 1/4 inch. Repeat with remaining chicken. Sprinkle chicken pieces lightly with salt.
3. Place about 1/4 cup of the stuffing mixture on half of each chicken breast. Fold the other half of the chicken breast over the filling. Secure with a toothpick.
4. Place the chicken in an 8x8x2-inch baking dish. Sprinkle with paprika.
5. Bake, covered, at 350°F for about 25 minutes or until chicken is tender and no longer pink.
6. Meanwhile, combine yogurt and marmalade. To serve, dollop about 1 tablespoon of the yogurt mixture atop each piece of chicken.
